candidates.row_label: Depreciation and Amortisation in Cost of services provided
candidates.why: This is an explicit COGS-related D&A line shown separately alongside the selected COGS bucket. The selected COGS final_choice uses 'Restructuring costs in Costs of services provided' plus 'Cost of services provided - Balancing value', and the total COGS appears to reconcile with this D&A row as an additional separate component rather than something embedded in the selected balancing row.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation and Amortisation in Administrative expenses
candidates.why: This is SG&A/admin-related D&A, not COGS-related, so it should not be added to the COGS bucket.

final_choice.row_label: Depreciation and Amortisation in Cost of services provided

variables.notes: Selected because the chosen COGS reference bucket excludes this separate D&A line and it should be added later to reconstruct full COGS without double counting.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation and Amortisation in Administrative expenses
candidates.why: This appears to be a component within the selected parent row 'Administrative expenses'. The selected XSGA bucket already includes 'Administrative expenses', so adding this separately would double count.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation and Amortisation in Cost of services provided
candidates.why: This belongs to COGS, not SG&A/XSGA, so it is not relevant for XSGA_DA.

variables.notes: No separate SG&A D&A row should be added. The visible admin D&A line appears embedded within the selected 'Administrative expenses' parent row.
